title: strobilanthes longipetiolata
intro: Strobilanthes longipetiolata, also known as 'Kalagar' or 'Thulasi', is a rare and endangered flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Strobilanthes longipetiolata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. It is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
